parameters.jsonBody:
={

  "contact_phone": "{{ $('normalizacao').item.json.http.remoteJid.replace('@s.whatsapp.net', '') }}",
  "last_message": "Nova mensagem",
  "last_message_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "unread_count": 1
}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "conversation_id": "{{ $json.id }}",
  "remote_jid": "{{ $json.remote_jid }}",
  "from_me": false,
  "message_type": "{{ $('normalizacao').item.json.msg.dbType }}",
  "content": {{ JSON.stringify($('normalizacao').item.json.msg.conteudo) }},
  "media_url": {{ (() => { try { const k = $('6b. Salva imagem no bucket').first().json.Key; return k ? '"https://ivlwadsixcetunnhkkam.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/' + k + '"' : 'null'; } catch(e) { return 'null'; } })() }},
  "status": "delivered"
}
